privileged_info_summary: Task expects synthetic health survey data (raw_health_survey.csv) with 100 records containing logical inconsistencies. Two validation rules: (1) Gender Conflict - identify Male respondents with IsPregnant=Yes (expected IDs: 15, 42, 78, 91); (2) Skip Pattern Conflict - identify respondents with EverSmoked=No but CigsPerDay>0 (expected IDs: 5, 33, 60). Total expected errors: 7 records. Agent must create an output CSV (validation_errors.csv) with columns RespondentID and ErrorType, containing only the 7 error records. Verifier checks: (1) output file exists and created during task session (30 pts); (2) all 4 gender conflicts detected (25 pts); (3) all 3 skip conflicts detected (25 pts); (4) no false positives (20 pts). Task fails if score < 80. Note: setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 files referenced in hooks are missing from repository.
